title: euphorbia pyrenaica
intro: Euphorbia pyrenaica, also known as Pyrenean spurge, is a species of flowering plant in the Euphorbiaceae family. It is a medicinal plant that has been traditionally used for its anti-inflammatory and analgesic properties, which have been attributed to the presence of sesquiterpenes and diterpenes in its latex. The health benefits of Euphorbia pyrenaica include relief from pain and inflammation, as well as potential antimicrobial and antioxidant effects. Euphorbia pyrenaica is typically used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, although caution should be exercised due to its potential toxicity and skin irritating properties.
